content.en:
Swire Daomeng Headquarters.

this day.

Ye Tian came here, and naturally attracted the attention of the Ancient Dao Alliance for the first time.

"A strange Sixfold Ancestor, who is this guy?"

"He is the Endless Saint Ancestor of the Void Fang Holy Gate of the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, no, it should be called the Endless Dao Ancestor now!"

"When did the Endless Dao Ancestor break through to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor realm? Didn't he follow the Void White Dao Ancestor to the Shattered Void Realm realm, and then the Void White Dao Ancestor came back, and he stayed alone in the Shattered Void Realm realm, but he came back by himself and became a Sixfold Origin Ancestor!!!

"The Endless Dao Ancestor has broken through, this is a good thing, it means that the strength of our Ancient Origin Domain has increased, making up for the losses caused by the fall of the Qinglong Dao Ancestor. Moreover, the strength of the Endless Dao Ancestor is even stronger!"

Soon.

The Void White Dao Ancestor also knew the news that Ye Tian had become the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and he rushed here as soon as possible.

When the Void White Dao Ancestor came to the headquarters of the Ancient Dao Alliance, he saw Ye Tian and said with emotion: "Endless Dao Ancestor, I didn't expect you to break through so quickly! Have you successfully condensed the Nine Folds Dao Fruit?"

"Yes, it's a fluke!"

Ye Tian said modestly.

The Void White Dao Ancestor was secretly surprised, although he knew that Ye Tian had traded enough to condense the Ninefold Dao Fruit's carrying thing, but whether he could successfully condense the Ninefold Dao Fruit or not depended on his own heritage and foundation!

"Endless Dao Ancestor, I really envy you, with the condensation of the Ninefold Dao Fruit, the potential for the future is too great, maybe there is really hope to become a Sevenfold Dao Ancestor!"

Xubai Dao Ancestor said enviously.

At this time, Ye Tian asked curiously, "Void White Dao Ancestor, how many Sixfold Origin Ancestors do we have in the Primeval Origin Realm?"

Xubai Dao Ancestor said: "How to say it, if you say that the Sixfold Ancestor who can still be contacted now, there are a total of fifty-two, and those who have been missing for a long time are naturally not counted." At present, there are only twenty-six Sixfold Primordial Ancestors who have been stationed at the boundary of the Primeval Origin for a long time, and the other Sixfold Ancestors are not staying in the Primeval Origin Boundary. "

With Ye Tian trading with the Void White Dao Ancestor, he had a general understanding of the strength of the Ancient Dao Alliance.

For example, most of the Dao Ancestors of the Ancient Dao Alliance were in the early stage realm of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and there were only five Dao Ancestors who had reached the middle realm of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

As for the Dao Ancestor of the late stage of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, except for the mysterious Ancient Dao Ancestor, there was really no one.

"Void White Dao Ancestor, is the Ancient Dao Ancestor missing?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Yes!" Xubai Dao Ancestor nodded, "It can't be regarded as missing, it can only be said that the Ancient Dao Ancestor went to a place where we can't go, and we don't know if it has fallen." But when the Ancient Dao Ancestor left, his cultivation had already reached the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and his combat power was extremely powerful, and the Ancient Origin Realm at that time was extremely powerful in the dozens of Origin Realm realms nearby, and the Ancient Dao Ancestor could suppress countless Sixfold Origin Ancestors with his own strength. It's a pity that after the disappearance and disappearance of the Ancient Dao Ancestor, the prestige of the Ancient Origin Realm has dropped again and again, and now it has become a weak boundary!"

Not long after, several Dao Ancestors came, and only then did they officially go through the formalities for Ye Tian to join the Ancient Dao Alliance, and let Ye Tian leave a mark in the Dao Gate, so that he could obtain the right to use the Dao Gate.

......

Soon.

Ye Tian became the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and the news of joining the Ancient Dao Alliance spread throughout the entire Ancient Origin Domain.

For this news, many half-step sixfold ancestors were not surprised, but they were surprised that Ye Tian had become a sixfold ancestor so quickly, the speed was too fast!

Upper Spirit Primordial Domain.

Upper Spiritual Gate.

At this time, after the Upper Spirit Saint Ancestor got Ye Tian's breakthrough to become a Sixfold Origin Ancestor, he couldn't help but sigh: "I think that at the beginning, I still wanted to challenge the Endless Dao Ancestor, but in the blink of an eye, he broke through to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, and I haven't made the slightest progress!"

Yes, he hasn't made any progress so far, and he still hasn't fused one more will clone.

In fact, he also gave up continuing to fuse the will clone, but he also failed to condense the Dao Heart once.

He couldn't even see the hope of becoming a Sixfold Origin Ancestor, compared to Ye Tian's easy ability to become a Sixfold Ancestor, it was simply too shocking!

The Toothless Gate.

The Void Tooth Holy Gate and the Heavenly Tooth Holy Ancestor were very excited.

"Hahahaha, our Void Tooth Holy Gate has given birth to a sixfold ancestor!!!"

What a sixfold ancestor represented, they naturally knew very well.

From today onwards, the Void Tooth Holy Gate will become the only sixfold holy gate in the Upper Spirit Origin Domain, completely crushing the other fivefold holy gates.

And the other Holy Sons of the Void Tooth Holy Gate, as well as many half-step fivefold ancestors, were completely confused when they heard the news at this moment.

What's going on?

Obviously they were geniuses of the same era, why were they still in the realm of the Fourfold Origin Ancestor, or the half-step Fivefold Origin Ancestor, but Ye Tian crossed over to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor and became the only Sixfold Origin Ancestor in the Shangling Origin Domain.

The genius who was in the same era as Ye Tian was undoubtedly too hit, and he couldn't be compared at all!

......

"Master, have you become a Sixfold Ancestor?"

Han Xuan said with some surprise.

"Yes, after I have completely stabilized the realm, we can go!"

Ye Tian said.

"Great!"

Han Xuan said happily.

Originally, she thought that if her master wanted to break through to the Sixfold Ancestor, it would take a long time, but she broke through so quickly, which was completely beyond her expectations!

After a period of time, Ye Tian completely stabilized the realm, and then prepared to go to the Tongtian Origin Domain Boundary.

There are several boundaries between the primeval realm boundary and the Tongtian Primordial Realm, and the Dao Gate of the Taikoto Dao Alliance cannot connect to the Tongtian Primordial Realm.

In fact, Daomen couldn't go to other realms except for the Shattered Void Realm and some special places.

It's like the primeval realm realm doesn't have a gate that connects to other realms, because the other realms don't agree, and if it's the primeval realm boundary, they won't agree!

In case the Dao Gate is allowed to be connected, the opponent's Dao Ancestor can easily cross over at any time, and even a half-step sixfold Origin Ancestor can be continuously transported, which will naturally affect his own boundary.

Therefore, the Dao Ancestors in the district boundary are very protective of their own district boundary, and if they want to go to other district boundaries, they can only honestly cross the Silent Black Sea.

"In vain, let's cross the Silent Black Sea directly, and if we don't transfer, we will go directly to the boundary of the Tongtian Origin Region!"

Ye Tian said.

Han Xuan said: "Master, cross directly, if you don't transfer, you will stay in the Silent Black Sea for a long time, what if you attract a very powerful primordial antiquity?"

"Don't worry, your master respects me very fast, it won't be long before it's dangerous!"

Ye Tian said.
